title: Claims Analyst
description: Vanguard, a global investment firm serving millions of investors, seeks a Claims Analyst to manage investor claims and inquiries. Working hybrid in Raleigh, you'll evaluate claims, resolve disputes, and ensure accurate processing. Join an organization committed to putting investors first.
responsibilities: Review and analyze investor claims and documented issues
Evaluate claim merit and determine appropriate resolution
Research client account transactions and documentation
Coordinate with internal departments to gather information
Follow up with claimants and ensure timely resolution

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business, or related field
skills: Analytical thinking and attention to detail
Knowledge of investment products and account operations

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and FSA coverage
Paid time off and flexible scheduling
